description: Fix v2 semantic review blocking issues: variance ratio voter unreachable due to deque maxlen, EA breakeven threshold contradicts Python design.
steps: 1. In config.py: Change REGIME_VARIANCE_RATIO_LOOKBACK from 20 to 19 so the check len(completed_bars) >= vr_lookback + 1 can pass (20 >= 20).
2. In NeuroX_EA_v9.mq5: Change InpBreakevenProfit from 0.30 to 5.00 to match Python Config.BREAKEVEN_PROFIT_THRESHOLD = 5.00.
acceptance_criteria: All tests pass (same 20 pre-existing failures acceptable)
